violations.text: Raw animal foods such as shelled eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as produce in the reach-in refrigerator in food pantry. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

Raw animal foods (such as shelled eggs and liquid egg whites) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as yogurt, bread, and butter) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment shall register a ServSafe certified employee with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager (RI license). New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

The cutting board is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023
